steps.title: Match both sides
steps.content: For the equation to have infinitely many solutions, the two sides must be identical for every value of $x$. That means the $x$-coefficients must match and the constant terms must match.

steps.title: Check the constant condition
steps.content:
The constants give the same value:
$$3k-16=k+46$$
$$2k=62$$
The answer is 31.
